You think your team presses high?

Arrigo Sacchi's AC Milan in the late 80s & early 90s MASTERED the offside trap AND zonal marking. They didn't just press, they SHRUNK the pitch to a terrifyingly small area. A defensive revolution that changed the game forever. PURE GENIUS! #FootballTactics #VintageFootball
